task_completion.description: Read the date and time from ~/appointment_details.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window or text editor displaying the contents of '~/appointment_details.txt' showing a date and time.

task_completion.description: Log into the medical system using provided credentials
task_completion.visual_evidence: A login screen with 'admin' entered, or a dashboard indicating the user is logged in as admin.

task_completion.description: Locate the pending appointment request for Isabella Martinez
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment requests list or patient chart showing a pending 'Dermatology Consultation' request for 'Isabella Martinez'.

task_completion.description: Schedule the appointment using the specified date and time
task_completion.visual_evidence: A scheduling form or dialog actively being filled out for 'Isabella Martinez' for a 'Dermatology Consultation', with the date and time matching the text file.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment status is SCHEDULED
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment summary, calendar, or patient dashboard showing the new appointment with a status of 'SCHEDULED'.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment request status is FULFILLED
task_completion.visual_evidence: The appointment requests list showing the request for Isabella Martinez with a status of 'FULFILLED', or the request is no longer in the 'pending' list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface of the medical system to schedule the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser or application GUI being navigated, rather than terminal commands executing API requests to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The appointment and request statuses were changed through legitimate application workflows.
integrity.visual_evidence: The transition from pending to fulfilled/scheduled is shown through standard application screens (e.g., clicking 'schedule', confirming details), not by editing database files directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success screens.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panels are open modifying the HTML to display 'SCHEDULED' or 'FULFILLED'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Isabella Martinez. Service Type: Dermatology Consultation. Expected Appointment Status: SCHEDULED. Expected Request Status: FULFILLED.
